name: Jiangnan Mould & Plastic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangnan Mould & Plastic Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells auto components. The company offers bumpers, moldings, grilles, license plates, spoilers, body side moldings, wheel opening products, rocker panels, fuel door covers, engine cover strips, and panels. Jiangnan Mould & Plastic Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Jiangyin, China.
